title: orchis palustris subsp. robusta
intro: Orchis palustris subsp. robusta, also known as robust marsh orchid, is a plant species belonging to the orchid family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The robust marsh orchid has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. It is often prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, and sometimes dried to be used in herbal infusions or added to skincare products due to its potential antioxidant and anti-aging effects.
